SCAM-001.description: Fraudsters claim the victim won a major prize and demand upfront payments for taxes or processing fees.

SCAM-002.description: Impersonating law enforcement to accuse the victim of crimes, pressuring them to transfer money for investigation.

SCAM-003.description: Claiming a billing error to offer a fake refund, then tricking victims into revealing bank credentials or OTPs.

SCAM-004.description: Posing as tech support or network providers to claim account issues and gain remote access or personal data.

SCAM-005.description: Building rapport through a fake 'wrong number' contact to eventually lure the victim into fraudulent investments.
